title.description: Job title shown below the name (e.g. "Head Trainer", "Youth Instructor").

bio.description: 2–3 sentence bio used on trainer cards and listing pages (max ~300 chars).

long_bio.description: Full rich-text biography displayed on the trainer's individual profile page.

disciplines.description: List of riding disciplines this trainer specialises in (e.g. "Hunter/Jumper", "Dressage").

years_experience.description: Number of years the trainer has been working professionally.

certifications.description: Comma-separated list of certifications (e.g. "USEF 'R' Judge, USDF Bronze Medalist").
